name: The Killer Frame
overview: Chhavi Biswas, a seemingly dull middle-aged photographer who has been a subject of mockery throughout his life, suddenly gets trapped in a world of darkness. When his true nature slowly comes to light in the form of secret tasks, he faces the wrath of greed and cruelty.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - The Killer Frame | Rahool Mukherjee | Stream Now | hoichoi
